tasks.title: Create plugin directory structure
tasks.description: Create plugins/ directory, plugins/hello_world/ subdirectory, and plugins/hello_world/src/ subdirectory for the hello_world WASM plugin example.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify plugins/ directory exists with correct structure
AddIntegrationTest: verify plugins/hello_world/src/ directory is created
RunTestSuite: cargo build -p opencode-plugin should succeed after structure creation
test_commands: cargo build -p opencode-plugin --features wasm 2>/dev/null || echo 'Plugin crate may not exist yet'
tasks.impl_notes: Use mkdir -p for nested directory creation. Ensure proper file permissions.

tasks.title: Create plugins/hello_world/Cargo.toml
tasks.description: Create Cargo.toml for hello_world plugin with package name 'opencode-plugin-hello-world', WASM target 'wasm32-wasi', and dependencies: wasmi, serde, serde_json.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Cargo.toml parses correctly with required fields
AddIntegrationTest: verify wasm32-wasi target is configured
RunTestSuite: cargo metadata should succeed for the plugin crate
test_commands: rustup target list --installed | grep -q wasm32-wasi || rustup target add wasm32-wasi
tasks.impl_notes: Package name must be 'opencode-plugin-hello-world'. Use wasmi for WASM runtime. Edition 2021.

tasks.title: Implement plugins/hello_world/src/lib.rs
tasks.description: Implement lib.rs with plugin_init() -> i32 function, plugin_execute(command: *const u8, len: usize) -> i32 function, and basic tool registration example.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify plugin_init returns valid initialization code
AddUnitTest: verify plugin_execute handles null pointers correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify WASM module exports required functions
RunTestSuite: cargo build --target wasm32-wasi should produce valid .wasm
tasks.impl_notes: plugin_init should return 0 for success. plugin_execute should parse command JSON and return result code. Export functions with WASM ABI.

tasks.title: Create plugins/hello_world/build.sh
tasks.description: Create build script with shebang #!/bin/bash that builds for wasm32-wasi target and outputs .wasm to plugins/bin/.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify build.sh has valid shebang
AddIntegrationTest: verify build.sh produces .wasm in plugins/bin/
RunTestSuite: ./plugins/hello_world/build.sh should complete without error
tasks.impl_notes: Script should create plugins/bin/ directory if not exists. Use cargo build --target wasm32-wasi.

tasks.title: Create scripts/build-plugins.sh
tasks.description: Create scripts/build-plugins.sh that builds all plugins in plugins/ directory, creates plugins/bin/ output directory, and handles errors for failed builds.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify script handles missing plugins directory gracefully
AddIntegrationTest: verify all plugins in plugins/ are built
RunTestSuite: ./scripts/build-plugins.sh should build all plugins without error
tasks.impl_notes: Use set -e for error handling. Iterate over plugins/*/ directories. Report failures per plugin.

tasks.title: Update crates/plugin/src/lib.rs with local .wasm loader
tasks.description: Add plugin loader for local .wasm files. Example: load from plugins/bin/*.wasm. Implement WASM module instantiation and function calling.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify load_plugin function handles invalid WASM gracefully
AddUnitTest: verify load_plugin function loads valid .wasm files
AddIntegrationTest: verify plugin_execute can be called on loaded plugin
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-plugin should pass
tasks.impl_notes: Use wasmi for WASM execution. Implement Plugin trait. Handle errors with OpenCodeError enum.

tasks.title: Document plugin development in CONTRIBUTING.md
tasks.description: Add plugin development documentation to CONTRIBUTING.md including how to create a new plugin, how to build and load plugins, and Plugin API reference.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify CONTRIBUTING.md contains plugin development section
AddIntegrationTest: verify plugin documentation links work
RunTestSuite: markdown lint should pass on updated CONTRIBUTING.md
tasks.impl_notes: Document plugin_init and plugin_execute API. Include example code snippets. Link to wasmi documentation.

tasks.title: Create crates/sdk/examples/ directory
tasks.description: Create the examples directory for SDK usage examples.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify examples/ directory exists
AddIntegrationTest: verify examples are discoverable by cargo
RunTestSuite: cargo build --examples -p opencode-sdk should list examples
tasks.impl_notes: This is a directory creation task. Examples will be added in subsequent tasks.

tasks.title: Implement examples/basic_usage.rs
tasks.description: Implement basic_usage.rs example that creates a Client with Config, creates and executes a session, prints response, and handles errors.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify basic_usage.rs compiles without errors
AddIntegrationTest: verify example creates Client and executes session
RunTestSuite: cargo build --examples -p opencode-sdk should succeed
tasks.impl_notes: Use async main with tokio. Include proper error handling with anyhow. Print response to stdout.

tasks.title: Implement examples/async_session.rs
tasks.description: Implement async_session.rs example that creates session with specific ID, saves session, resumes session, exports session to JSON, and imports session from JSON.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify async_session.rs compiles without errors
AddIntegrationTest: verify session save/resume cycle works
RunTestSuite: cargo build --example async_session -p opencode-sdk should succeed
tasks.impl_notes: Use serde_json for JSON import/export. Store session ID for resumption. Handle errors gracefully.

tasks.title: Implement examples/tool_execution.rs
tasks.description: Implement tool_execution.rs example that registers custom tool, executes Read tool, executes Write tool, and handles tool result.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify tool_execution.rs compiles without errors
AddIntegrationTest: verify custom tool registration works
RunTestSuite: cargo build --example tool_execution -p opencode-sdk should succeed
tasks.impl_notes: Implement a simple echo tool as example. Show how to use tool registry. Handle tool errors.

tasks.title: Implement examples/provider_config.rs
tasks.description: Implement provider_config.rs example that configures OpenAI provider, configures Anthropic provider, configures Ollama provider, and shows environment variable setup.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify provider_config.rs compiles without errors
AddIntegrationTest: verify provider configuration API works
RunTestSuite: cargo build --example provider_config -p opencode-sdk should succeed
tasks.impl_notes: Use provider traits from opencode-core. Show env var configuration pattern. Include API key setup.

tasks.title: Verify all examples compile
tasks.description: Verify all examples compile with cargo build --examples. Fix any compilation errors. Add examples to Cargo.toml manifest.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify each example file compiles individually
AddIntegrationTest: verify all examples build together
RunTestSuite: cargo build --examples -p opencode-sdk should succeed with no errors
tasks.impl_notes: Check each example builds. Fix compilation errors. Ensure examples are listed in [[example]] sections.

tasks.title: Update crates/sdk/README.md
tasks.description: Update SDK README with badges (docs.rs, crates.io), Installation section, Quick Start section, and links to examples.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify README.md contains required sections
AddIntegrationTest: verify badges link to correct URLs
RunTestSuite: verify README.md renders correctly with markdown viewer
tasks.impl_notes: Add shields.io badges. Include cargo add instructions. Add quick code snippet.

tasks.title: Add branch operations to crates/git/src/lib.rs
tasks.description: Add Branch variant to GitOperation enum and Checkout variant to GitOperation enum.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Branch variant exists in GitOperation enum
AddUnitTest: verify Checkout variant exists in GitOperation enum
RunTestSuite: cargo build -p opencode-git should succeed
tasks.impl_notes: Add variants to GitOperation enum. Ensure proper error handling for each operation type.

tasks.title: Create crates/git/src/branch.rs
tasks.description: Create branch.rs with git_branch_list() -> Result<Vec<String>>, git_branch_create(name: &str) -> Result<()>, git_branch_delete(name: &str) -> Result<()> functions.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify git_branch_list returns list of branch names
AddUnitTest: verify git_branch_create creates a new branch
AddUnitTest: verify git_branch_delete removes a branch
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling for invalid branch names
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-git -- branch should pass
tasks.impl_notes: Use git2 crate for git operations. Handle detached HEAD state. Return meaningful errors.

tasks.title: Create crates/git/src/checkout.rs
tasks.description: Create checkout.rs with git_checkout(branch: &str) -> Result<()> and git_checkout_create(name: &str) -> Result<()> functions.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify git_checkout switches branches correctly
AddUnitTest: verify git_checkout_create creates and checks out new branch
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling for unmerged branch deletion
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-git -- checkout should pass
tasks.impl_notes: Use git2::checkout::CheckoutBuilder for checkout operations. Handle conflicts during checkout.

tasks.title: Add merge operations
tasks.description: Add git_merge(branch: &str) -> Result<MergeResult> with handling for clean merge and conflicts (return conflict info).
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify git_merge performs fast-forward merge
AddUnitTest: verify git_merge handles three-way merge
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify git_merge handles merge conflicts correctly
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-git -- merge should pass
tasks.impl_notes: Return MergeResult enum with variants for Clean, Conflict, UpToDate. Include conflict file list.

tasks.title: Add rebase operations
tasks.description: Add git_rebase(branch: &str) -> Result<()>, git_rebase_abort() -> Result<()>, and handle conflicts.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify git_rebase performs rebase correctly
AddUnitTest: verify git_rebase_abort cancels rebase and restores original state
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify git_rebase handles conflicts during rebase
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-git -- rebase should pass
tasks.impl_notes: Use git2's rebase functionality. Store original HEAD for abort operation. Handle in-memory rebase state.

tasks.title: Add stash operations
tasks.description: Add git_stash() -> Result<()>, git_stash_pop() -> Result<()>, git_stash_list() -> Result<Vec<StashEntry>>, git_stash_drop(index: usize) -> Result<()>.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify git_stash saves working directory state
AddUnitTest: verify git_stash_pop restores stashed changes
AddUnitTest: verify git_stash_list returns all stash entries
AddUnitTest: verify git_stash_drop removes specific stash entry
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-git -- stash should pass
tasks.impl_notes: StashEntry should contain index, message, and branch info. Handle empty stash gracefully.

tasks.title: Add push/pull operations
tasks.description: Add git_push(remote: Option<&str>) -> Result<PushResult> and git_pull(remote: Option<&str>) -> Result<PullResult> with upstream tracking handling.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify git_push pushes to remote correctly
AddUnitTest: verify git_pull pulls from remote correctly
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify git_push handles authentication failures
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify git_pull handles merge conflicts from remote
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-git -- push should pass
tasks.impl_notes: PushResult should include number of refs updated. PullResult should include merge summary. Handle no upstream set.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for git operations
tasks.description: Add comprehensive unit tests for branch creation/deletion, checkout, merge (clean and conflict), stash, and push/pull operations.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: test branch creation/deletion
AddUnitTest: test checkout
AddUnitTest: test merge (clean and conflict)
AddUnitTest: test stash
AddUnitTest: test push/pull
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-git should pass all tests
tasks.impl_notes: Create temporary git repos for testing. Use git2::Repository::init_bare for testing. Clean up temp dirs.

tasks.title: Create crates/lsp/src/diagnostics.rs
tasks.description: Create diagnostics.rs with Diagnostic struct (range, severity, message), publish_diagnostics handler, and wire up to LSP client.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Diagnostic struct has required fields
AddUnitTest: verify publish_diagnostics handler sends correct notifications
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-lsp -- diagnostics should pass
tasks.impl_notes: DiagnosticSeverity enum should have Error, Warning, Info, Hint. Range uses start/end line/column.

tasks.title: Create crates/lsp/src/completion.rs
tasks.description: Create completion.rs with CompletionItem struct, completion handler, trigger character handling (. -> ::), and context-aware filtering.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify CompletionItem struct has required fields
AddUnitTest: verify completion triggers on . -> :: characters
AddIntegrationTest: verify completion filtering works correctly
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-lsp -- completion should pass
tasks.impl_notes: CompletionItem should have label, kind, detail, and insert_text. Handle trigger context.

tasks.title: Create crates/lsp/src/references.rs
tasks.description: Create references.rs with references handler, find all references to symbol, include declaration, and workspace-wide or document-only scope.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify references returns all locations for a symbol
AddUnitTest: verify references includes declaration location
AddIntegrationTest: verify references works workspace-wide
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-lsp -- references should pass
tasks.impl_notes: Return Location array with URI and range. Include context parameter for include_declaration.

tasks.title: Update crates/lsp/src/lib.rs
tasks.description: Add new modules to lib.rs, wire up handlers, and update capability registration for diagnostics, completion, and references.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify new modules are properly exported
AddIntegrationTest: verify handlers are wired to LSP protocol
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-lsp should pass
tasks.impl_notes: Register capabilities with initialize result. Wire handlers in handle_notification and handle_request.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for LSP capabilities
tasks.description: Add unit tests for diagnostics publishing, completion items, and reference finding.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: test diagnostics publishing
AddUnitTest: test completion items generation
AddUnitTest: test reference finding
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-lsp should pass all tests
tasks.impl_notes: Use mock LSP client for testing. Verify protocol compliance. Test edge cases.

tasks.title: Create opencode-benches/src/tool_execution.rs
tasks.description: Create benchmarks for tool execution: bench_read_small_file (< 1KB), bench_read_large_file (> 1MB), bench_write_file (1KB), bench_grep (1000-line file), bench_glob (100 files).
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify benchmark functions exist and compile
RunTestSuite: cargo bench -p opencode-benches -- tool_execution should run
tasks.impl_notes: Use criterion crate for benchmarking. Create temp files for tests. Report mean and std dev.

tasks.title: Create opencode-benches/src/session_load.rs
tasks.description: Create benchmarks for session CRUD: bench_session_create, bench_session_save (SQLite), bench_session_resume (SQLite), bench_session_delete.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify session benchmark functions exist and compile
RunTestSuite: cargo bench -p opencode-benches -- session_load --no-run should succeed
tasks.impl_notes: Use temp database for benchmarks. Measure cold vs warm performance. Include p50/p95/p99 percentiles.

tasks.title: Create opencode-benches/src/llm_roundtrip.rs
tasks.description: Create LLM streaming benchmarks: bench_llm_first_token, bench_llm_full_response, bench_provider_openai, bench_provider_anthropic.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify LLM benchmark functions exist and compile
RunTestSuite: cargo bench -p opencode-benches -- llm_roundtrip --no-run should succeed
tasks.impl_notes: Mock LLM provider for consistent benchmarking. Measure first token latency separately from total time.

tasks.title: Update opencode-benches/src/lib.rs
tasks.description: Add new benchmark modules to lib.rs, add criterion measurements, and add report generation.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify all benchmark modules are included
RunTestSuite: cargo bench -p opencode-benches -- --no-run should list all benchmarks
tasks.impl_notes: Use mod keyword to include new modules. Set up criterion with configured measurement time.

tasks.title: Verify benchmarks run successfully
tasks.description: Run cargo bench to completion, verify report is generated, and ensure no panics or errors occur.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure all benchmarks complete without panic
AddRegressionTest: ensure benchmark report is generated
RunTestSuite: cargo bench -p opencode-benches should complete successfully
tasks.impl_notes: Run with --save-baseline for comparison. Check for any benchmark failures in output.

tasks.title: Create tests/integration/test_websocket.rs
tasks.description: Create integration tests: test_ws_connect (basic connection), test_ws_execute_stream (execute with streaming), test_ws_multiple_streams (concurrent streams).
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: test_ws_connect verifies WebSocket connection establishes
AddIntegrationTest: test_ws_execute_stream verifies streaming execution works
AddIntegrationTest: test_ws_multiple_streams verifies concurrent stream handling
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-integration-tests -- test_websocket should pass
tasks.impl_notes: Use tokio-tungstenite for WebSocket client. Use wasm_bindgen_test for WASM tests if needed.

tasks.title: Implement WebSocket edge case tests
tasks.description: Create edge case tests: test_ws_empty_response, test_ws_long_response, test_ws_connection_drop.
test_criteria: AddErrorHandlingTest: test_ws_empty_response handles empty streaming response
AddErrorHandlingTest: test_ws_long_response handles very long streaming response
AddErrorHandlingTest: test_ws_connection_drop handles disconnect mid-stream
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-integration-tests -- test_ws_edge should pass
tasks.impl_notes: Test server timeout handling. Verify partial response is handled correctly. Check cleanup on drop.

tasks.title: Add memory leak detection for WebSocket
tasks.description: Verify buffers are freed after streaming. Ensure no growing allocations on repeated streams.
test_criteria: AddErrorHandlingTest: verify buffers are freed after streaming completes
AddRegressionTest: verify no memory growth on repeated stream operations
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-integration-tests -- test_ws_memory should pass
test_commands: valgrind --leak-check=full cargo test -p opencode-integration-tests -- test_ws 2>&1 | grep -i 'definitely lost\|indirectly lost' | head -10 || echo 'Valgrind not available or test passed'
tasks.impl_notes: Use memory profiling tools. Verify WebSocket buffers are dropped. Check for Arena or pool allocations.

tasks.title: Update crates/server/src/routes/execute/ws.rs with debug logging
tasks.description: Add debug logging for testing. Ensure proper cleanup on drop for WebSocket connections.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify debug logging is properly gated behind feature flag
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-server -- ws should pass
tasks.impl_notes: Use tracing crate for logging. Ensure Drop implementation properly closes WebSocket. Gate logs behind feature.

tasks.title: Update crates/sdk/Cargo.toml for crates.io publishing
tasks.description: Update SDK Cargo.toml with version, license, description, repository URL, documentation URL, keywords, and categories.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Cargo.toml has all required publishing metadata
RunTestSuite: cargo metadata -p opencode-sdk should show correct metadata
tasks.impl_notes: Use semver version 0.1.0. MIT license. Add relevant keywords like 'sdk', 'opencode', 'ai'.

tasks.title: Update crates/sdk/README.md with publishing info
tasks.description: Add crates.io badge, docs.rs badge, Installation section, Quick Start example, and link to full documentation.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify README.md has crates.io badge
AddUnitTest: verify README.md has docs.rs badge
AddIntegrationTest: verify README.md renders correctly
RunTestSuite: verify README.md has required sections
tasks.impl_notes: Use shields.io for badges. Include cargo add command. Add quick code example.

tasks.title: Verify dry-run publish succeeds
tasks.description: Run cargo publish --dry-run to verify publishing configuration is correct. Fix any warnings or errors.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: cargo publish --dry-run should complete without error
AddRegressionTest: no warnings about missing metadata should appear
RunTestSuite: cargo publish --dry-run -p opencode-sdk should succeed
tasks.impl_notes: This verifies the SDK is ready for publishing. Actual publishing requires manual crates.io account.

tasks.title: Create docs/ directory structure
tasks.description: Create docs/ directory, docs/getting-started.md, docs/sdk-guide.md, and docs/plugin-dev.md files.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify docs/ directory and files exist
RunTestSuite: verify docs/*.md files are readable
tasks.impl_notes: Create all documentation files with appropriate content structure.

tasks.title: Write docs/README.md
tasks.description: Write documentation index with quick links to each section and link to API reference in crate docs.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify docs/README.md contains index and links
RunTestSuite: verify docs/README.md renders correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Use markdown links. Include table of contents. Link to crate documentation.

tasks.title: Write docs/getting-started.md
tasks.description: Write getting started guide with installation instructions, configuration guide, first session walkthrough, and basic commands.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify getting-started.md has installation section
AddUnitTest: verify getting-started.md has configuration guide
AddIntegrationTest: verify all links in getting-started.md are valid
RunTestSuite: verify getting-started.md renders correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Include prerequisites. Show config.toml example. Step-by-step first use guide.

tasks.title: Write docs/sdk-guide.md
tasks.description: Write SDK guide with SDK overview, installation via Cargo, link to crates/sdk/examples/, and API reference links.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify sdk-guide.md has installation section
AddIntegrationTest: verify sdk-guide.md links to examples directory
RunTestSuite: verify sdk-guide.md renders correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Include cargo add instructions. Link to specific examples. API reference can link to docs.rs.

tasks.title: Write docs/plugin-dev.md
tasks.description: Write plugin development guide with WASM setup instructions, hello_world example walkthrough, building and loading plugins, and Plugin API reference.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify plugin-dev.md has architecture overview
AddIntegrationTest: verify plugin-dev.md links to hello_world example
AddIntegrationTest: verify plugin-dev.md has working build instructions
RunTestSuite: verify plugin-dev.md renders correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Document plugin_init and plugin_execute API. Show build script example. Include troubleshooting section.

tasks.title: Update crate READMEs with cross-links
tasks.description: Update crates/sdk/README.md to link to docs/sdk-guide.md, crates/plugin/README.md to link to docs/plugin-dev.md, and root README.md to link to docs/.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify sdk README links to sdk-guide.md
AddUnitTest: verify plugin README links to plugin-dev.md
AddUnitTest: verify root README links to docs/
RunTestSuite: verify all README links render correctly
test_commands: grep -q 'plugin-dev\|docs/plugin' crates/plugin/README.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'crates/plugin/README.md may not exist'
tasks.impl_notes: Use relative links where possible. Ensure links are valid markdown.
